project_description: Help us to create 2 Social Media posts per week

organization.name: Green Hour Foundation
organization.description: We only have one planet. It is up to us to do what we can to protect it. With this in mind, Green Hour was established in 2018 to raise the awareness in the community of the importance of environmental protection. With over 80 cleanups organised, 100+ weekly Bun Run's fighting food waste, as well as school and corporate partnerships, Green Hour continues to make a growing positive impact in Hong Kong.

what_we_need: Join us for a 30 minutes call to learn more about our organisation and our social media strategy
Create 2 social media posts per week for Instagram
project_details.background: We are a Hong Kong based NGO which aims to promote the importance of living a sustainable lifestyle through direct community action and individual acts which can bring positive change.
project_details.what_we_have: Images, branding, topical guidelines, access to our Canva Pro account, post schedule and templates will be provided.Posts will be bilingual, however all content for the posts will be provided for you!
project_details.why_important: Your social media posts will create awareness for our mission, in hopes to build up a community and get support or donation from the audiences.
